label: CHADD PXPICS Irrigation v0.93
info: Refactored Node-RED flow using Home Assistant helpers as source of truth.

name: Reset counters
func: msg.payload={}; return msg;

name: Build helper refs
func:
msg.helpers = {
    manual_override: 'input_boolean.chadd_pxpics_manual_override_enabled',
    dry_run: 'input_boolean.chadd_pxpics_dry_run_mode',
    skip_next: 'input_boolean.chadd_pxpics_skip_next_shot',
    fallback_alert: 'input_boolean.chadd_pxpics_fallback_alert_enabled',
    decision_log: 'input_boolean.chadd_pxpics_decision_log_enabled',
    fallback_mode: 'input_select.chadd_pxpics_fallback_mode',
    last_reason: 'input_text.chadd_pxpics_last_blocker_reason',
    last_irrigation: 'input_datetime.chadd_pxpics_last_irrigation',
    last_irrigation_day: 'input_datetime.chadd_pxpics_last_irrigation_of_day',
    min_gap: 'input_number.chadd_pxpics_min_time_between_shots',
    max_pump: 'input_number.chadd_pxpics_max_pump_time',
    timeout: 'input_number.chadd_pxpics_sensor_timeout_minutes',
    fallback_shots_today: 'input_number.chadd_pxpics_fallback_shots_today',
    fallback_shots_limit: 'input_number.chadd_pxpics_fallback_shots_today_limit',
    fallback_time: 'input_number.chadd_pxpics_fallback_pump_time',
    irrigation_count_today: 'input_number.chadd_pxpics_irrigation_count_today',
    max_irrigations_per_day: 'input_number.chadd_pxpics_max_irrigations_per_day',
    sanity_vwc_min: 'input_number.chadd_pxpics_value_sanity_vwc_min',
    sanity_vwc_max: 'input_number.chadd_pxpics_value_sanity_vwc_max',
    sanity_ec_min: 'input_number.chadd_pxpics_value_sanity_ec_min',
    sanity_ec_max: 'input_number.chadd_pxpics_value_sanity_ec_max',
    mqtt_base: 'input_text.chadd_pxpics_mqtt_base_topic',
    zone_name: 'input_text.chadd_pxpics_zone_name',
    phase_auto_mode: 'input_boolean.chadd_pxpics_phase_auto_mode',
    phase_mode: 'input_select.chadd_pxpics_phase_mode',
    growth_stage: 'input_select.chadd_pxpics_growth_stage',
    intent_profile_index: 'input_number.chadd_pxpics_intent_profile_index',
    phase_profile_name: 'input_text.chadd_pxpics_current_profile_name',
    gen_dryback: 'input_number.chadd_pxpics_gen_dryback_target',
    veg_dryback: 'input_number.chadd_pxpics_veg_dryback_target',
    gen_shot: 'input_number.chadd_pxpics_gen_shot_size_ml',
    veg_shot: 'input_number.chadd_pxpics_veg_shot_size_ml',
    gen_max_day: 'input_number.chadd_pxpics_gen_max_irrigations_per_day',
    veg_max_day: 'input_number.chadd_pxpics_veg_max_irrigations_per_day',
    p2_hold: 'input_number.chadd_pxpics_p2_hold_minutes',
    window_start: 'input_number.chadd_pxpics_window_start_minutes',
    window_end: 'input_number.chadd_pxpics_window_end_minutes',
    vwc_fc_ref: 'input_number.chadd_pxpics_vwc_fc_ref'
};

return msg;

name: Load intent profile
func:
const p = msg.payload || {};
const intent = Number(p.intent || 1);
const idx = Math.min(10, Math.max(1, Number(p.intent_profile_index || intent)));

const profileMap = {
  1: {
    name: 'VEG 1',
    group: 'veg',
    steering: 'soft_veg',
    dryback: 18,
    drybackMin: 12,
    drybackMax: 22,
    shot: 90,
    maxDay: 8,
    p2: false,
    p2Hold: 0,
    vwcFloorPct: 78,
    windowStart: 525,
    windowEnd: 900,
    windowEndMode: 'end_of_window'
  },
  2: {
    name: 'VEG 2',
    group: 'veg',
    steering: 'soft_veg',
    dryback: 22,
    drybackMin: 16,
    drybackMax: 26,
    shot: 100,
    maxDay: 8,
    p2: false,
    p2Hold: 0,
    vwcFloorPct: 75,
    windowStart: 525,
    windowEnd: 900,
    windowEndMode: 'end_of_window'
  },
  3: {
    name: 'VEG 3',
    group: 'veg',
    steering: 'veg_stable',
    dryback: 26,
    drybackMin: 20,
    drybackMax: 30,
    shot: 110,
    maxDay: 7,
    p2: false,
    p2Hold: 0,
    vwcFloorPct: 72,
    windowStart: 525,
    windowEnd: 900,
    windowEndMode: 'redefined_window'
  },
  4: {
    name: 'VEG 4',
    group: 'veg',
    steering: 'veg_stable',
    dryback: 30,
    drybackMin: 24,
    drybackMax: 34,
    shot: 120,
    maxDay: 7,
    p2: false,
    p2Hold: 0,
    vwcFloorPct: 69,
    windowStart: 525,
    windowEnd: 900,
    windowEndMode: 'redefined_window'
  },
  5: {
    name: 'TRANS 5',
    group: 'veg',
    steering: 'transition',
    dryback: 34,
    drybackMin: 28,
    drybackMax: 38,
    shot: 130,
    maxDay: 6,
    p2: false,
    p2Hold: 0,
    vwcFloorPct: 66,
    windowStart: 525,
    windowEnd: 900,
    windowEndMode: 'redefined_window'
  },
  6: {
    name: 'FLOWER 6',
    group: 'flower',
    steering: 'light_gen',
    dryback: 38,
    drybackMin: 32,
    drybackMax: 42,
    shot: 140,
    maxDay: 6,
    p2: true,
    p2Hold: 15,
    vwcFloorPct: 63,
    windowStart: 525,
    windowEnd: 900,
    windowEndMode: 'redefined_window'
  },
  7: {
    name: 'FLOWER 7',
    group: 'flower',
    steering: 'light_gen',
    dryback: 41,
    drybackMin: 35,
    drybackMax: 45,
    shot: 150,
    maxDay: 6,
    p2: true,
    p2Hold: 20,
    vwcFloorPct: 60,
    windowStart: 525,
    windowEnd: 900,
    windowEndMode: 'redefined_window'
  },
  8: {
    name: 'FLOWER 8',
    group: 'flower',
    steering: 'gen_balanced',
    dryback: 44,
    drybackMin: 38,
    drybackMax: 48,
    shot: 160,
    maxDay: 5,
    p2: true,
    p2Hold: 25,
    vwcFloorPct: 57,
    windowStart: 525,
    windowEnd: 900,
    windowEndMode: 'redefined_window'
  },
  9: {
    name: 'FLOWER 9',
    group: 'flower',
    steering: 'gen_strong',
    dryback: 47,
    drybackMin: 41,
    drybackMax: 49,
    shot: 170,
    maxDay: 5,
    p2: true,
    p2Hold: 30,
    vwcFloorPct: 54,
    windowStart: 525,
    windowEnd: 900,
    windowEndMode: 'redefined_window'
  },
  10: {
    name: 'FLOWER 10',
    group: 'flower',
    steering: 'gen_max',
    dryback: 49,
    drybackMin: 43,
    drybackMax: 49,
    shot: 180,
    maxDay: 5,
    p2: true,
    p2Hold: 35,
    vwcFloorPct: 51,
    windowStart: 525,
    windowEnd: 900,
    windowEndMode: 'end_of_window'
  }
};

const prof = profileMap[idx];

msg.profile = prof;
msg.payload = {
  ...p,
  profile: prof,
  profile_name: prof.name,
  phase_group: prof.group,
  profile_steering: prof.steering,
  profile_dryback: prof.dryback,
  profile_dryback_min: prof.drybackMin,
  profile_dryback_max: prof.drybackMax,
  profile_shot: prof.shot,
  profile_max_day: prof.maxDay,
  profile_p2: prof.p2,
  profile_p2_hold: prof.p2Hold,
  profile_vwc_floor_pct: prof.vwcFloorPct,
  profile_window_start: prof.windowStart,
  profile_window_end: prof.windowEnd,
  profile_window_mode: prof.windowEndMode,
  dryback_target: prof.dryback,
  dryback_target_min: prof.drybackMin,
  dryback_target_max: prof.drybackMax,
  shot_size_ml: prof.shot,
  max_irrigations_per_day: prof.maxDay
};

return msg;

name: Build MQTT fallback log
build mqtt log
Build MQTT log
func:
const p = flow.get('lastDecision') || (msg.payload || {});
msg.topic = `${p.topicBase || 'grow/CHADD_PXPICS'}/${p.zone || 'zone_1'}/decision`;
msg.payload = JSON.stringify({
  action: p.action,
  reason: p.reason,
  dryRun: p.dryRun,
  mode: p.mode,
  primary: p.primary,
  fallback: p.fallback,
  phaseAuto: p.phaseAuto,
  phaseMode: p.phaseMode,
  growthStage: p.growthStage,
  profileName: p.profileName,
  vwc: p.vwc,
  ec: p.ec,
  drybackPct: p.drybackPct,
  shotSize: p.shotSize,
  pumpTime: p.pumpTime,
  ts: p.now,
  fallbackCountToday: p.fallbackCountToday,
  fallbackShotsTodayLimit: p.fallbackShotsTodayLimit,
  irrCountToday: p.irrCountToday,
  maxIrrPerDay: p.maxIrrPerDay
});
return msg;
